tasting_rooms.name: Domäne Wachau Vinothek
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar tour with 4-wine tasting EUR 32 per person; individual wines by the glass from EUR 4
tasting_rooms.description: The modernly designed vinotheque beneath the baroque Kellerschlössel in Dürnstein stocks the complete Domäne Wachau range. Guided cellar tours run Fridays at 14:00 and Saturdays at 11:00 from April to October.

tasting_rooms.name: Salon 77 - Nikolaihof Wachau
tasting_rooms.address: Nikolaigasse 3, 3512 Mautern an der Donau, Austria
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in glass tastings from EUR 5; guided tasting flights by arrangement
tasting_rooms.description: The on-estate tasting salon at Austria's oldest biodynamic winery, operating by Demeter principles since 1971. Open Wednesday to Saturday for walk-in tastings of current vintages plus rare back-vintages from the Resereve Cellar.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Emmerich Knoll Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; tasting flights arranged with the family, pricing on request
tasting_rooms.description: The stylish tasting room in a new cellar building directly opposite the historic Knoll family home in Unterloiben. The Knoll family personally guides visitors through benchmark Smaragd Rieslings and Veltliners from the Kellerberg and Schutt vineyards.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut F.X. Pichler Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment only; tasting fees by arrangement
tasting_rooms.description: The sleek modern winery of F.X. Pichler sits among the terraced vineyards just outside Oberloiben. Tastings are strictly by prior appointment at this pilgrimage destination for serious Austrian wine collectors.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Pichler-Krutzler Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; sales Monday to Friday with prior arrangement
tasting_rooms.description: State-of-the-art cellar embedded in a restored medieval estate at the entrance to the Wachau. Elisabeth Pichler-Krutzler's precise Smaragd whites from the Ried Ried Kellerberg and Loibenberg vineyards are poured in the quiet tasting room.

tasting_rooms.name: Winzer Krems Sandgrube 13
tasting_rooms.address: Sandgrube 13, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
tasting_rooms.pricing: Wein.Sinn cellar experience EUR 12 per person; individual tastings from EUR 3
tasting_rooms.description: The flagship tasting space of the Winzer Krems cooperative, the largest wine producer in Lower Austria. The immersive Sandgrube 13 Wein.Sinn experience moves through eight interactive cellar stations culminating in a 4-D film. Open Monday to Saturday.

tasting_rooms.name: Taste Krems - Weingut Stadt Krems
tasting_rooms.address: Stadtgraben 11, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
tasting_rooms.pricing: Taste Krems Basic EUR 25 (6 wines + sparkling welcome); Masterclass EUR 55 (8 wines + foods)
tasting_rooms.description: A joint tasting experience operated by Weingut Stadt Krems (founded 1452) and Weingut Stift Göttweig (founded 1083) in the historic Stadtgraben cellar. Two structured programmes pair wines from both estates with artisanal regional foods.

tasting_rooms.name: Vinothek Thal Wachau
tasting_rooms.address: Wachaustraße 242, 3610 Weißenkirchen in der Wachau, Austria
tasting_rooms.pricing: Daily tastings of featured winemaker included free; bottles from EUR 10
tasting_rooms.description: The communal wine shop of 14 Weißenkirchen winegrowers. A different member producer pours daily from April to October, making this the most practical tasting stop for the central Wachau without booking ahead.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Stift Göttweig Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Individual glass tastings EUR 1 per sample (waived on purchase); guided tour packages on request
tasting_rooms.description: The farm-gate tasting room of the Benedictine Stift Göttweig, founded 1083 and commanding sweeping views over the Danube Valley. The abbey has produced wine continuously for over 900 years; the cellar experience tour links viniculture history with current releases.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Tegernseerhof
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; sales at the lovely courtyard tasting room
tasting_rooms.description: Martin Mittelbach's fifth-generation estate in Unterloiben, dating more than 1,000 years. The peaceful courtyard tasting room lets visitors sample the current Smaragd and Federspiel range directly with the family.

tasting_rooms.name: Domäne Wachau Kellerschlössl Heuriger
tasting_rooms.pricing: No fixed admission; wines by the glass from EUR 5; traditional Heuriger platter from EUR 15
tasting_rooms.description: The pop-up Heuriger tavern in the baroque Kellerschlössel garden, open on select summer weekends. Guests enjoy the full Domäne Wachau portfolio alongside regional charcuterie with a view over the iconic Kellerberg Riesling terraces.

tasting_rooms.name: Weinhimmel Wein & Genuss
tasting_rooms.address: Untere Landstraße 35, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tastings from EUR 4 per glass; curated flights by winemaker Wolfgang Gansdorfer on request
tasting_rooms.description: A wine boutique and tasting bar in central Krems with more than 200 Austrian and international wines. Winemaker Wolfgang Gansdorfer runs themed tastings with truffle, ham and cheese accompaniments; a regional standout for browsing and walk-in pours.

verified.address_quoted: Untere Landstraße 35, 3500 Krems an der Donau

tasting_rooms.name: Steigenberger Smaragd Wine Bar & Vinotheque
tasting_rooms.address: Am Goldberg 2, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
tasting_rooms.pricing: By the glass from EUR 7; structured Wachau tasting flights from EUR 30
tasting_rooms.description: The hotel wine bar at Steigenberger Hotel & Spa Krems, positioned on a vineyard rise with panoramic views of the Wachau UNESCO landscape. The Smaragd bar and vinotheque curate a focused selection of regional Vinea Wachau producers alongside international wines.

verified.address_quoted: Am Goldberg 2, 3500, Krems an der Donau

tasting_rooms.name: W.E.R.O. Wine Shop
tasting_rooms.address: Marktstraße 5, 3620 Spitz an der Donau, Austria
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tasting samples from EUR 3; bottles from EUR 12
tasting_rooms.description: A curated wine boutique on the main street of Spitz featuring artisanal Vinea Wachau producers across six estates. The compact shop focuses exclusively on Grüner Veltliner and Riesling in the Steinfeder, Federspiel and Smaragd classifications.

tasting_rooms.name: Boutiquehotel WeinSpitz Vinotheque - Weingut Donabaum
tasting_rooms.address: In der Spitz 3, 3620 Spitz an der Donau, Austria
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in wine shop; in-house tasting for hotel guests included; non-guests by arrangement
tasting_rooms.description: The floor-to-ceiling glass vinotheque and wine lounge in Weingut Donabaum's boutique hotel, overlooking the Setzberg vineyard. Martin and Alexandra Donabaum's Smaragd whites from the Strawanzer vineyard are the centrepiece of the tasting list.

verified.address_quoted: In der Spitz 3, 3620 Spitz an der Donau

tasting_rooms.name: Leopold Weinbar & Vinothek
tasting_rooms.address: Utzstraße 1, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
tasting_rooms.pricing: By the glass from EUR 4.50; over 100 wines at shop prices for sit-in consumption
tasting_rooms.description: A wine bar and vinothek in the heart of Krems, open Monday to Saturday from 16:00 until midnight. More than 100 labels from Wachau, Kamptal, Kremstal, Traisental and Wagram are poured at vinothek prices alongside a warm kitchen until late.
